title: Second Hand
pitch: A time-loop pawnshop where gear appreciates through other people's deaths.
howto: Buy gear at the morning market and sell it to adventurers, then watch their dungeon run in the ticker. Most die — their kit returns cheap, enchanted by what they killed and what killed them. Buy the story back, resell it dearer; grind gold, rep tiers, shelf slots and the fusion bench.
controls: Everything by tap: BUY, SELL, HAGGLE or PASS. Tap any item to read its story; fuse two stories at the Fusion Bench.
